parts.text: Please provide information about adding, removing, or claiming device protection.
I need to check if my phone insurance will cover water damage.
Can you explain how to make a claim under my AppleCare coverage?
I’d like to verify if my protection plan was cancelled or still active.
My phone is damaged, and I want to know how to start an insurance claim.
I’m looking to update my protection coverage or switch to another plan.
I have a question about my device protection plan and what it covers.
I was wondering if my new iPhone automatically includes device protection.
Can you help me add AppleCare or another protection plan to my new phone?
Please transfer me to the insurance or claims department.
I’d like to file a claim because my device was dropped and the screen cracked.
I’m trying to determine if my protection plan covers accidental damage.
I need to cancel the insurance plan I have on my phone.
Can you tell me what my options are for device protection or AppleCare?
I want to remove the device protection from my account.
Please help me understand how to make a claim under my phone insurance.
I think my phone is insured, but I want to double-check what’s included.
I’d like to review the details of my current device protection coverage.
I’m calling to find out if my insurance is still active on this phone.
Can you assist me in submitting a damage claim through my protection plan?
I need to speak with someone from the device protection department.
Please help me file an insurance claim for my damaged phone.
I want to add device protection or insurance coverage to my account.
Can you confirm whether I still have AppleCare on my device?
I’d like to check if my phone is currently covered under a device protection plan.
